description_long: This object is a linear guard rail constructed from several parallel horizontal metal tubes, supported by two vertical posts at either end. The horizontal rails are evenly spaced, creating a barrier that is both visually open and physically restrictive. The structure is finished in a glossy black color, giving it a modern and durable appearance suitable for urban environments. The ends of the vertical posts are capped, and the rails are attached with visible mounting brackets. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative elements or reflective markings. This guard rail is typically used to prevent pedestrian or vehicular access to restricted areas, such as along sidewalks, roadsides, or parking lots.
description: A glossy black metal guard rail with four horizontal rails and two vertical posts, designed for urban safety and separation. The structure is minimalistic and sturdy, with capped ends and visible mounting brackets.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four horizontal rails and both vertical posts, with clear visibility of the mounting brackets.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the vertical post and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all horizontal rails and vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile with minimal visible detail except the post edge.
